title: [ConstantFolding] Support bitcasting vectors to smaller element sizes with non-integer ratios.
author: varev-dev
description:
This patch fixes a crash when constant folding bitcast from a vector with larger elements to a vector with smaller ones, where the element count ratio is not an integer (e.g., <3 x i32> to <4 x i24>).

Previously the logic assumed a uniform ratio, leading to an incorrect number of result elements and subsequent crashes in RAUW. This patch implements a bit-stream evaluation to correctly extract smaller elements from the source vector.

Fixes #179626
